_comment: Tracks synchronization between MAgPIE codebase and agent documentation
_instructions: Update this file whenever syncing with MAgPIE develop branch

pending_review._comment: Commits that have been identified but not yet integrated into documentation

recent_syncs.summary: Large sync — 49 commits across 30 modules. Major theme: forestry/timber/carbon overhaul (PR #869 ipopt_part1, PR #872 bef-bcef-option2). Updated module_14, module_32, module_35, module_52, module_73 docs + module_29_notes. Scaling.gms refactor across 30+ modules deemed no doc update needed (solver scaling only).

changes_reviewed.description: PR #869 (ipopt_part1): Forestry module overhaul — BEF/BCEF fix, IPCC wood density, stacking factor, growing stock calibration
changes_reviewed.notes: Largest single commit in sync. Renamed pm_timber_yield → im_growing_stock (flux → stock). Renamed p32_yield_forestry_future → i32_growing_stock_at_harvest. Promoted s14_carbon_fraction → sm_carbon_fraction (superset). Renamed f14_ipcc_bce (2D) → fm_ipcc_bef (1D, interface). Renamed f14_aboveground_fraction → fm_aboveground_fraction (interface). Added Module 52 growing-stock calibration (preloop.gms, 118 new lines) with FRA 2025 targets, iter52 set, s52_growingstock_calib switch (default on). Added uncalib variants (pm_carbon_density_*_ac_uncalib) for afforestation/tree-cover. Added pm_land_plantation interface (M32 → M52). Added im_vol_conv (M52 → M73). im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry). Added s32_est_cost_plant_reest replanting discount.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #872 (fix/bef-bcef-option2): refinement on top of PR #869
changes_reviewed.notes: Overlaps with PR #869 — both mutate the same modules. Net diff captured in the end-state on origin/develop.

changes_reviewed.description: Rewrite residue equation for clarity and consistency
changes_reviewed.notes: q73_prod_residues now includes both plantation + natveg + both wood+woodfuel as sources; excludes slack variable. Updated citation to Thiffault 2015 + Oswalt 2019 + Di Fulvio 2016.

changes_reviewed.description: residues share documentation
changes_reviewed.notes: Comment-only improvements in M73 equations.gms — captured in the PR #869 sync update.

changes_reviewed.notes: Config/default.cfg and input.gms comment updates only. Captured in doc sync (comments improved explanation of new scalars).

changes_reviewed.notes: Whitespace only.

changes_reviewed.description: automatic update of realization files
changes_reviewed.notes: Auto-generated description header updates in realization.gms files (single-line additions). No semantic change.

changes_reviewed.description: changelog entries — systematic scaling.gms refactor
changes_reviewed.notes: Solver scaling directives (`.scale(...)`) across 30+ modules. Affects solver convergence, not equations/variables/parameters. M52 and M14 gained new scaling.gms files (captured in PR #869 sync). No doc impact for the rest.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #874 (f_calibration): Updated calibration factors for land conversion costs
changes_reviewed.notes: R-script calibration expansion only (CHANGELOG + config/default.cfg bump). No GAMS module impact.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #870: feature/eur-output-scripts (aggregated region mapping)
changes_reviewed.notes: R reporting scripts only (scripts/output/extra/rds_report_aggr_region.R). No GAMS impact.

changes_reviewed.description: PR #867 (f_btc2): Output script for 'Bending the Curve 2' project land use reporting
changes_reviewed.notes: R reporting script only (scripts/output/projects/BtC2_reportDisaggLandUse.R). No GAMS impact.

validation_results.check_18_default_realizations: pass (46 modules, all default labels match config/default.cfg)
validation_results.syntactic_validator: 17/18 checks pass; Check 14 (GAMS variable names) flags 27 mismatches — ALL EXPECTED: new variables exist on origin/develop (im_growing_stock, im_vol_conv, fm_ipcc_bef, fm_aboveground_fraction, pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac_uncalib, pm_carbon_density_plantation_ac_uncalib, i32_growing_stock_at_harvest, s52_growingstock_calib, s73_natveg_cost_premium, s73_woodfuel_stacking_factor, s32_est_cost_plant_reest, s73_residue_removal_cost, s14_minimum_growing_stock, i52_bef_avg, i52_m_avg_natveg, i52_m_avg_plant, f52_fra_nrf_gs, f52_fra_pla_gs, f52_volumetric_conversion, i73_timber_prod_cost_natveg) but not in the user's local working tree (still at ce6e1a89a). Validator will pass once the user runs `git pull origin develop`.
validation_results.cross_check: docs match origin/develop state; local working tree is 49 commits behind docs until user pulls

module_sync_status._comment: Track which modules may need updates based on code changes

recently_updated.reason: PR #869: pm_timber_yield → im_growing_stock (flux → stock semantic); fm_ipcc_bef / fm_aboveground_fraction / sm_carbon_fraction promoted to interface/superset; s14_minimum_growing_stock replaces s14_minimum_wood_yield.
PR #869: Tree-cover on cropland now reads pm_carbon_density_*_ac_uncalib (new uncalibrated variants from M52). Documented in module_29_notes.md.

PR #869: p32_yield_forestry_future → i32_growing_stock_at_harvest; s32_est_cost_plant_reest replanting discount; im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry); pm_land_plantation new interface parameter to M52.

PR #869: All three production equations (q35_prod_secdforest, q35_prod_primforest, q35_prod_other) use im_growing_stock instead of pm_timber_yield. Corrected upstream dependency attribution (was mis-attributed to M73; now correctly attributed to M14).

PR #869: Major addition — 118-line preloop.gms for Chapman-Richards k calibration to FRA 2025 growing-stock targets via bisection. New FRA target input files. New interface im_vol_conv (consumed by M73). New uncalib variants preserved for afforestation. New reads from M28, M32, M14 (sm_carbon_fraction, fm_ipcc_bef, fm_aboveground_fraction).

PR #869 + PR #872: Cost equation rewritten (4 terms now — base, natveg premium, residue, slack). im_timber_prod_cost now (i, kforestry) using im_vol_conv from M52. Scalar units changed (USD17MER/tDM → USD17MER/m3 at source, 148→89, 74→44). New scalars s73_natveg_cost_premium (0.15), s73_woodfuel_stacking_factor (0.65). Renamed s73_reisdue_removal_cost → s73_residue_removal_cost (typo fix, 2.5→2.7). Residue equation rewritten (includes plantation + natveg + both products). Removed f73_volumetric_conversion.csv (moved to M52's f52_volumetric_conversion).
f_btc2 conservation tau feature - new equations, cluster-level vm_tau

sync_workflow.description: How to keep documentation in sync with MAgPIE code
steps: 1. Run 'git log develop --oneline -N' to see recent commits
2. Identify commits that affect GAMS modules (not just R scripts, configs)
3. For each relevant commit, check if it changes equations, parameters, or logic
5. If doc updates needed, update the relevant module_XX.md files
6. Mark updates complete in this log
